'''âs-k-w''' ('''sakawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embargo|embargo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embargo|embargo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-k-w
|-
! Lemma
| sakawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakawithi|sakawithi]] || [[word:sakawiji|sakawiji]] || [[word:sakawishi|sakawishi]] || [[word:sakawi|sakawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakawuthuth|sakawuthuth]] || [[word:sakawujuj|sakawujuj]] || [[word:sakawushush|sakawushush]] || [[word:sakaw|sakaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakawuthu|sakawuthu]] || [[word:sakawuju|sakawuju]] || [[word:sakawushu|sakawushu]] || [[word:sakawu|sakawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakawufuth|sakawufuth]] || [[word:sakawufuj|sakawufuj]] || [[word:sakawufush|sakawufush]] || [[word:sakawuf|sakawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakawethe|sakawethe]] || [[word:sakaweje|sakaweje]] || [[word:sakaweshe|sakaweshe]] || [[word:sakawe|sakawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakawothoth|sakawothoth]] || [[word:sakawojoj|sakawojoj]] || [[word:sakawoshosh|sakawoshosh]] || [[word:sakaw|sakaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakawotho|sakawotho]] || [[word:sakawojo|sakawojo]] || [[word:sakawosho|sakawosho]] || [[word:sakawo|sakawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakawofoth|sakawofoth]] || [[word:sakawofoj|sakawofoj]] || [[word:sakawofosh|sakawofosh]] || [[word:sakawof|sakawof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakawĂŻfĂŻf|sakawĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻfĂŻf|sakawĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻfĂŻf|sakawĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻfĂŻf|sakawĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]] || [[word:sakawĂŻf|sakawĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakawĂŠthĂŠ|sakawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sakawĂŠjĂŠ|sakawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sakawĂŠshĂŠ|sakawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sakawĂŠ|sakawĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakawathath|sakawathath]] || [[word:sakawajaj|sakawajaj]] || [[word:sakawashash|sakawashash]] || [[word:sakaw|sakaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakawatha|sakawatha]] || [[word:sakawaja|sakawaja]] || [[word:sakawasha|sakawasha]] || [[word:sakawa|sakawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakawafath|sakawafath]] || [[word:sakawafaj|sakawafaj]] || [[word:sakawafash|sakawafash]] || [[word:sakawaf|sakawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sakawasha|sakawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosakawasha|gosakawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisakawasha|gokisakawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sakawnĂŒsha|sakawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosakawnknĂŒsha|gosakawnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisakawnĂŒsha|gokisakawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sakawshĂ«sha|sakawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosakawnkshĂ«sha|gosakawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisakawshĂ«sha|gokisakawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakawrosha|sakawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakawnkrosha|gosakawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakawrosha|gokisakawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sakawmusha|sakawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakawnkmusha|gosakawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakawmusha|gokisakawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sakawsherasha|sakawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosakawnksherasha|gosakawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisakawsherasha|gokisakawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sakawngasha|sakawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosakawnkngasha|gosakawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisakawngasha|gokisakawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sakawyasha|sakawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosakawnkyasha|gosakawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisakawyasha|gokisakawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sakawyamasha|sakawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosakawnkyamasha|gosakawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisakawyamasha|gokisakawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sakawnĂŒshĂ«sha|sakawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosakawnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosakawnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisakawnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisakawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakawnĂŒrosha|sakawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakawnknĂŒrosha|gosakawnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakawnĂŒrosha|gokisakawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakawnĂŒmusha|sakawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakawnknĂŒmusha|gosakawnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakawnĂŒmusha|gokisakawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sakawshĂ«nĂŒsha|sakawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosakawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosakawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisakawshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisakawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakawshĂ«rosha|sakawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakawnkshĂ«rosha|gosakawnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakawshĂ«rosha|gokisakawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakawshĂ«musha|sakawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakawnkshĂ«musha|gosakawnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakawshĂ«musha|gokisakawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sakawronĂŒsha|sakawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosakawnkronĂŒsha|gosakawnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisakawronĂŒsha|gokisakawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sakawroshĂ«sha|sakawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosakawnkroshĂ«sha|gosakawnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisakawroshĂ«sha|gokisakawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakawromusha|sakawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakawnkromusha|gosakawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakawromusha|gokisakawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sakawmunĂŒsha|sakawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosakawnkmunĂŒsha|gosakawnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisakawmunĂŒsha|gokisakawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sakawmushĂ«sha|sakawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosakawnkmushĂ«sha|gosakawnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisakawmushĂ«sha|gokisakawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakawmurosha|sakawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakawnkmurosha|gosakawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakawmurosha|gokisakawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sakaw|sakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠw|sĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosakaw|hosakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠkĂŠw|hosĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosakaw|hohosakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠkĂŠw|hohosĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsakaw|nĂŒsakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠkĂŠw|nĂŒsĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsakaw|nĂŒnĂŒsakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠkĂŠw|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsakaw|nĂŻsakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠkĂŠw|nĂŻsĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsakaw|nĂŻnĂŻsakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠkĂŠw|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusakaw|lusakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠkĂŠw|lusĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusakaw|lulusakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠkĂŠw|lulusĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisakaw|lisakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠkĂŠw|lisĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisakaw|lilisakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠkĂŠw|lilisĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosakaw|kosakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠkĂŠw|kosĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosakaw|kokosakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠkĂŠw|kokosĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesakaw|kesakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠkĂŠw|kesĂŠkĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesakaw|kekesakaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠkĂŠw|kekesĂŠkĂŠw]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
